name: studiomcphub
title: StudioMCPHub
description: Creative AI tools and museum art datasets for autonomous agents. 24 MCP tools: image generation (SD 3.5 + Imagen 3), 5-model ESRGAN upscaling, tiered metadata enrichment (standard SEO + premium museum-grade), resize/convert, provenance registration, Arweave permanent storage, NFT minting, wallet storage, and 53K+ museum artworks from Alexandria Aeternum. Three payment rails: x402 USDC micropayments, Stripe per-call, and GCX credits with volume discounts.
